guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Third-party verification or assurance process in place" for Scope 2 emissions in response to 7.9.
guidance.textKo: 이 문항은 7.9에 대한 응답으로 Scope 2 배출에 대해 "제3자 검증 또는 보증 프로세스가 마련되어 있음"을 선택한 경우에만 나타납니다.

guidance.text:
General 
If you are reporting third party verification or assurance underway, your entries into the table should reflect the emissions that are being subject to verification/assurance for the current reporting year, with the exception of the attached statement, which will relate to a previous year. 
CDP understands that you may seek verification for reasons other than reporting to CDP and that confidential information may be included within your detailed verification statement. In this case, it is sufficient for your verifier/assurer to attest to the Scope and level of assurance/verification through correspondence such as an abbreviated statement as long as this covers the data points outlined below (see guidance for column 5 "Attach your statement here"). 
Scope 2 approach (column 1) 
The "Scope 2 market based" dropdown only appears if you select "We are reporting a Scope 2, market-based figure" in column "Scope 2, market-based" of 7.3.
If you operate in a region where you need to calculate both a location-based and a market-based figure to meet Scope 2 requirements, at this stage CDP only requires for you to verify one of these figures. 
However, in the interest of transparency, you are asked to disclose which of the two figures you have verified. 
Verification or assurance cycle in place (column 2) 
A biennial verification/assurance process is where emissions are verified once every two years and a triennial verification/assurance process is where emissions are verified once every three years. 
You may refer to the further information in 7.9 on annual, biennial and triennial processes for further information on annual, biennial and triennial processes. 
Status in the current reporting year (column 3) 
Please select the option most appropriate to your company. 
Type of verification or assurance (column 4) 
This column relates to the type of verification or assurance that has been awarded. 
The option that is relevant will depend on the verification standard to which the verification process has been completed and the level of assurance agreed between the verifier and the company. 
Companies can select from the following options: 
Not applicable - In very few cases, usually in program based compliance, the verification standard does not include a level of assurance; in this case select this option. 
Limited assurance - This is one of the most common levels of assurance and, for e.g., is appropriate to verification undertaken in accordance with ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 and The Climate Registry. 
Moderate assurance - For example, this level of assurance is appropriate to verification undertaken in accordance with AA1000AS and attestation standards established by AICPA. 
Reasonable assurance - For example, this is appropriate to verification undertaken under ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 and The Climate Registry; all verification undertaken for EU ETS compliance is to a level of "reasonable assurance" (according to the requirements of EA-6/03). 
High assurance - For example, this is appropriate to verification undertaken in accordance with AA1000AS and attestation standards established by AICPA. 
Third party verification/assurance underway - Select this option if verification/assurance is underway and you do not yet know the level of assurance that you are intending to achieve. 
Attach the statement (column 5) 
Note the requirements for the statement detailed below and the option to use the CDP template . 
All companies should attach a verification statement here unless they have selected "No verification or assurance of current reporting year" or "Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place" in column 3 ‘Status in the current reporting year'. The statement should: 
Clearly state that GHG emissions have been verified or assured as part of the process. If the statement refers to other documents that have been verified (such as Sustainability Report, Financial Report, GRI etc.) where items verified are specified, please attach those to the question as well; 
Relate to the relevant Scope; 
Clearly state the opinion and type of verification/assurance that has been given and the verification standard used; and 
Cover the current reporting year, or covers the 12-months prior if "Underway but not complete for reporting year - previous statement of process attached" is selected in "Status in the current reporting year" column. 
Page/section reference (column 6) 
Please identify the page and the section that contains details of your verification/assurance of Scope 2 emissions. 
Relevant standard (column 7) 
This column captures the verification standard against which the verification process has been undertaken. It does not refer to the reporting or calculation standard. 
CDP has produced criteria for what constitutes an acceptable verification standard. All accepted verification standards, and exceptions to their use, are listed here . 
The verification standard reported in this column should be consistent with the standard stated in the verification statement. If the response is submitted before the official CDP deadline, CDP will then review the standard used and add it to the website under "accepted" or "not accepted" depending on the outcome of the standard review. 
If the response is submitted after the official deadline, CDP cannot commit to review the standard used in time for scoring. 
Select from the accepted standards listed or use "Other, please specify". 
Standards that have been approved by EU Member States for ESRS verification (e.g. H2A in France, SSAE in Italy or other such standards) should be reported by selecting the option "European Sustainability Reporting Standards (ESRS)".
The verification standards reported in this column should be consistent with the standards stated in the verification statement. 
Proportion of reported emissions verified (%) (column 8) 
It may be the case that only a sub-section of your emissions has been verified/assured due to, for e.g., regulatory requirements. 
Please identify what proportion of your total reported emissions for Scope 2 has been subject to the verification/assurance process described.
guidance.textKo:
일반 
진행 중인 제3자 검증 또는 보증을 보고하는 경우, 전년도와 관련된 첨부 명세서를 제외하고 현재 보고연도에 검증/보증 목표인 배출량을 표에 항목으로 반영해야 합니다. CDP는 귀사가 CDP에 보고하는 것 이외의 이유로 확인을 요청할 수 있으며 귀사의 세부 확인서에 기밀 정보가 포함될 수 있다는 점을 이해합니다. 이 경우, 검증자/보증인은 아래에 설명된 데이터 포인트를 포함하는 한 약식 진술과 같은 서신을 통해 보증/검증의 범위 및 수준을 증명하는 것으로 충분합니다(5열 "여기에 진술서 첨부"에 대한 지침 참조). Scope 2 접근 방식(1열) 
"Scope 2 시장 기반" 드롭다운은 7.3의 "Scope 2, 시장 기반" 열에서 "Scope 2, 시장 기반 수치를 보고합니다"를 선택한 경우에만 나타납니다. Scope 2 요구 사항을 충족하기 위해 위치 기반 및 시장 기반 수치를 모두 계산해야 하는 지역에서 운영하는 경우, 이 단계에서 CDP는 이러한 수치 중 하나만 확인하면 됩니다. 다만, 투명성을 위해 두 수치 중 어떤 수치를 확인했는지 공개해 주시기 바랍니다. 검증 또는 보증 주기가 확립되어 있습니다(2열). 
2년마다 검증/보증 프로세스는 2년에 한 번씩 배출량을 검증하는 것이며, 3년마다 검증/보증 프로세스는 3년에 한 번씩 배출량을 검증하는 것입니다. 연간, 2년, 3년 과정에 대한 추가 정보는 연간, 2년, 3년 과정에 관한 7.9의 추가 정보를 참조할 수 있습니다. 당해 보고연도의 현황(3열) 
귀사의 기업에 가장 적합한 선택지를 선택해 주세요. 검증 또는 보증 유형(4열) 
이 열은 부여된 검증 또는 보증 유형과 관련됩니다. 관련 선택지는 검증 프로세스가 완료된 검증 표준과 검증자와 기업 간에 합의된 보증 수준에 따라 달라집니다. 기업은 다음 선택지 중에서 선택할 수 있습니다. 
해당 없음 - 일반적으로 프로그램 기반 규정 준수의 경우 검증 표준에 보증 수준이 포함되지 않는 경우가 많습니다. 이 경우 이 선택지를 선택하십시오. 제한적 보증 - 이는 가장 일반적인 보증 수준 중 하나이며, 예를 들어 ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 및 The Climate Registry에 따라 수행된 검증에 적합합니다. 보통 수준의 보증 - 예를 들어 이 보증 수준은 AA1000AS 및 AICPA에서 제정한 증명 표준에 따라 수행되는 검증에 적합합니다. 합리적인 보증 - 예를 들어 ISO14064-3, ISAE3000, ASAE3000 및 The Climate Registry에 따라 수행된 검증에 적합합니다. EU ETS 준수를 위해 수행된 모든 검증은 (EA-6/03의 요구 사항에 따라) "합리적인 보증" 수준입니다. 높은 보증 - 예를 들어 AA1000AS 및 AICPA에서 제정한 증명 표준에 따라 수행되는 검증에 적합합니다.

제3자 검증/보증 진행 중 - 검증/보증이 진행 중이고 달성하려는 보증 수준을 아직 알지 못하는 경우 이 선택지를 선택하십시오. 명세서 첨부(5열) 
아래에 설명된 설명에 대한 요구 사항과 CDP 템플릿을 사용하는 선택지를 참고하세요. 모든 기업은 3열 '현재 보고연도의 상태'에서 "현재 보고연도에 대한 검증 또는 보증 없음" 또는 "현재 보고연도에 대해 진행 중이지만 완료되지 않음 - 발생한 첫 해"를 선택하지 않는 한 여기에 확인서를 첨부해야 합니다. 성명서는 다음과 같아야 합니다: 
온실가스 배출량이 프로세스의 일부로 검증 또는 보장되었음을 명확하게 기술합니다. 기타 검증된 문서(지속가능성 보고서, 재무보고서, GRI 등)에 검증된 항목이 명시되어 있는 경우에는 해당 내용도 문항에 첨부해 주십시오. 
관련 범위와 관련됩니다. 
제공된 검증/보증의 의견, 유형 및 사용된 검증 기준을 명확하게 기술합니다. 그리고 
현재 보고연도를 포함하거나, "현재 보고연도의 상태" 열에서 "보고연도에 진행 중이지만 완료되지 않음 - 이전 프로세스 명세서 첨부"를 선택한 경우 이전 12개월을 포함합니다. 페이지/섹션 참조(6열) 
Scope 2 배출에 대한 확인/보증에 대한 세부 정보가 포함된 페이지와 섹션을 확인하십시오. 관련 표준(7열) 
이 열에는 검증 프로세스가 수행된 검증 표준이 나와 있습니다. 보고 또는 계산 표준을 참조하지 않습니다. CDP는 수용 가능한 검증 표준을 구성하는 기준을 마련했습니다. 허용되는 모든 확인 표준과 사용 예외 사항은 여기에 나열되어 있습니다. 본 열에 보고된 검증기준은 검증성명서에 기재된 기준과 일치해야 합니다. 공식 CDP 마감일 이전에 응답이 제출되면 CDP는 사용된 표준을 검토하고 표준 검토 결과에 따라 이를 "승인됨" 또는 "승인되지 않음"으로 웹사이트에 추가합니다. 공식 마감일 이후에 답변이 제출되면 CDP는 채점 시간에 맞춰 사용된 표준을 검토할 것을 약속할 수 없습니다. 나열된 허용 표준 중에서 선택하거나 "기타, 명시하십시오"를 사용하십시오. ESRS 검증을 위해 EU 회원국에서 승인한 표준(예: 프랑스의 H2A, 이탈리아의 SSAE 또는 기타 유사한 표준)은 "유럽 지속 가능성 보고 표준(ESRS)" 선택지를 선택하여 보고해야 합니다. 본 열에 보고된 검증기준은 검증성명서에 기술된 기준과 일치해야 합니다. 보고된 배출량 확인 비율(%)(8열) 
예를 들어 규제 요구 사항으로 인해 배출량의 하위 섹션만 검증/보증된 경우가 있을 수 있습니다. Scope 2에 대해 보고된 총 배출량 중 기술된 검증/보증 프로세스의 목표이 된 비율을 식별하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Either 'Complete' OR 'Underway but not complete for reporting year - previous statement of process attached' selected in column 'Status in current reporting year'.
i) All of the following columns completed - 3.5 points
- 'Verification or assurance cycle in place'
- 'Type of verification or assurance'
- 'Attach the statement'
ii) Column 'Page/section reference' completed - 0.5 points
iii) Column 'Relevant standard' completed - 1 point
iv) Column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' completed - 1 point
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in current reporting year' - 6 points
A maximum of 6/6 points is available for this route.
One row scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria: Not scored.
criteria.criteriaKo: 채점하지 않습니다.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
Document(s) in column 'Attach the statement' meet all of the following criteria - 4 points
i) The statement relates to Scope 2 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions OR it is clear that Scope 2 GHG emissions were the subject of the assurance engagement.
AND
ii) The statement relates to the correct reporting year provided in question 1.4 AND 'Complete' is selected in column 'Status in the reporting year'.
OR
'Annual process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 12-month period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Biennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 2-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 3-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
AND
iii) The verification standard referenced in the document is accepted by CDP.
AND
iv) The statement contains an opinion or finding which confirms verification.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year' - 3 points
A maximum of 3/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
‘No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route
One row scored.
(Please note: Only documents provided in question 7.9.2 will be scored for this question. All verification or assurance statements attached in one row are subject to the Management level criteria. Please see the CDP verification page for the full list of accepted verification standards. If multiple standards are selected in column ‘Relevant standard', the statements attached should collectively reference all standards selected.)
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
ROUTE A)
Both of the following criteria are met - 1 point
i) 'No' selected in question 7.4
OR
'Yes' selected in question 7.4 AND
'Scope 2 (location-based)' AND 'Scope 2 (market-based)' NOT selected in column 'Scope(s) or Scope 3 category(ies)' in all rows question 7.4.1.
OR
'Yes' selected in question 7.4 AND
'Scope 2 (location-based)' OR 'Scope 2 (market-based)' selected in column 'Scope(s) or Scope 3 category(ies)' in some/all rows in question 7.4.1 AND
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to recent acquisition' selected in column 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source' OR 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source' in all applicable rows in question 7.4.1.
ii) The following is met for all rows where ‘Scope 2 location-based' is selected in ‘Scope 2 approach' OR for all rows where ‘Scope 2 market-based' is selected in ‘Scope 2 approach':
For all rows where 'Annual process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
OR
For all rows where 'Biennial process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
OR
For all rows where 'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
(Please note: For criterion ii) in column 'Scope 2 approach', ‘Scope 2 location-based' AND ‘Scope 2 market-based' rows will NOT be combined in the sum of figures.)
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' in all rows - 0 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.

ROUTE A)
Document(s) in column 'Attach the statement' meet all of the following criteria - 4 points
i) The statement relates to Scope 2 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions OR it is clear that Scope 2 GHG emissions were the subject of the assurance engagement.
AND
ii) The statement relates to the correct reporting year provided in question 1.4 AND 'Complete' is selected in column 'Status in the reporting year'.
OR
'Annual process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 12-month period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Biennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 2-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 3-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
AND
iii) The verification standard referenced in the document is accepted by CDP.
AND
iv) The statement contains an opinion or finding which confirms verification.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year' - 3 points
A maximum of 3/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
‘No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route
One row scored.
(Please note: Only documents provided in question 7.9.2 will be scored for this question. All verification or assurance statements attached in one row are subject to the Management level criteria. Please see the CDP verification page for the full list of accepted verification standards. If multiple standards are selected in column ‘Relevant standard', the statements attached should collectively reference all standards selected.)
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Full Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
ROUTE A)
Both of the following criteria are met - 1 point
i) 'No' selected in question 7.4
OR
'Yes' selected in question 7.4 AND
'Scope 2 (location-based)' AND 'Scope 2 (market-based)' NOT selected in column 'Scope(s) or Scope 3 category(ies)' in all rows question 7.4.1.
OR
'Yes' selected in question 7.4 AND
'Scope 2 (location-based)' OR 'Scope 2 (market-based)' selected in column 'Scope(s) or Scope 3 category(ies)' in some/all rows in question 7.4.1 AND
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to recent acquisition' selected in column 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source' OR 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source' in all applicable rows in question 7.4.1.
ii) The following is met for all rows where ‘Scope 2 location-based' is selected in ‘Scope 2 approach' OR for all rows where ‘Scope 2 market-based' is selected in ‘Scope 2 approach':
For all rows where 'Annual process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
OR
For all rows where 'Biennial process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
OR
For all rows where 'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
(Please note: For criterion ii) in column 'Scope 2 approach', ‘Scope 2 location-based' AND ‘Scope 2 market-based' rows will NOT be combined in the sum of figures.)
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' in all rows - 0 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
One row scored.

criteria.criteria:
Full Disclosure points must be awarded to be eligible for Management points.
ROUTE A)
Document(s) in column 'Attach the statement' meet all of the following criteria - 4 points
i) The statement relates to Scope 2 greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions OR it is clear that Scope 2 GHG emissions were the subject of the assurance engagement.
AND
ii) The statement relates to the correct reporting year provided in question 1.4 AND 'Complete' is selected in column 'Status in the reporting year'.
OR
'Annual process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 12-month period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Biennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 2-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
OR
'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' AND
'Underway...previous statement attached' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' AND
Document attached refers to a 3-year period prior to the reporting year provided in question 1.4.
AND
iii) The verification standard referenced in the document is accepted by CDP.
AND
iv) The statement contains an opinion or finding which confirms verification.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year' - 3 points
A maximum of 3/4 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
‘No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/4 points is available for this route
One row scored.

If multiple standards are selected in column ‘Relevant standard', the statements attached should collectively reference all standards selected.)

criteria.criteria:
Full Management points must be awarded to be eligible for Leadership points.
ROUTE A)
Both of the following criteria are met - 1 point
i) 'No' selected in question 7.4
OR
'Yes' selected in question 7.4 AND
'Scope 2 (location-based)' AND 'Scope 2 (market-based)' NOT selected in column 'Scope(s) or Scope 3 category(ies)' in all rows question 7.4.1.
OR
'Yes' selected in question 7.4 AND
'Scope 2 (location-based)' OR 'Scope 2 (market-based)' selected in column 'Scope(s) or Scope 3 category(ies)' in some/all rows in question 7.4.1 AND
Either 'Emissions are not relevant' OR 'Emissions excluded due to recent acquisition' selected in column 'Relevance of location-based Scope 2 emissions from this source' OR 'Relevance of market-based Scope 2 emissions from this source' in all applicable rows in question 7.4.1.
ii) The following is met for all rows where ‘Scope 2 location-based' is selected in ‘Scope 2 approach' OR for all rows where ‘Scope 2 market-based' is selected in ‘Scope 2 approach':
For all rows where 'Annual process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
OR
For all rows where 'Biennial process' is selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
OR
For all rows where 'Triennial process' selected in column 'Verification or assurance cycle in place' the following must be met: All relevant statement(s) attached meet all Management criteria in ROUTE A) AND sum of figures provided in column 'Proportion of reported emissions verified (%)' is 100.
(Please note: For criterion ii) in column 'Scope 2 approach', ‘Scope 2 location-based' AND ‘Scope 2 market-based' rows will NOT be combined in the sum of figures.)
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'Underway but not complete for current reporting year - first year it has taken place' selected in column 'Status in the current reporting year' in all rows - 0 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No verification or assurance of current reporting year' selected in column 'Status in the current reported year'- 0 points
A maximum of 0/1 points is available for this route.
